articles.description: Mendoza is just third player in history to be a Heisman Trophy winner, a national champion and the first overall draft pick in the same year.
articles.title: NFL Draft 2026: Fernando Mendoza is first overall pick by Las Vegas Raiders

articles.description: Will it be Manchester City or Arsenal for the Premier League title? BBC Sport gets pundits, reporters and fans to predict each of their remaining fixtures - and who will win the league.
articles.title: Who will win Premier League title? The big prediction special

articles.description: More than 120 organisations issue a travel advisory for visitors to this summer's World Cup, warning of potential threats to their human rights.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: Rights groups warn visitors to US to be cautious

articles.description: The Olympic cricket stadium for LA 2028 could host Indian Premier League teams as part of their global expansion plans, says Kolkata Knight Riders chief executive Venky Mysore.
articles.title: LA 2028: Olympic cricket venue 'on agenda' for IPL expansion into USA

articles.description: American Nelly Korda takes a two shot lead at the Chevron Championship after the first round, with England's Mimi Rhodes lying fours shots off the top on her tournament debut.
articles.title: Chevron Championship: Nelly Korda takes lead as England's Mimi Rhodes impresses

articles.description: Fernando Mendoza was the first pick in the NFL Draft. His mother, who lives with MS, has been his main source of inspiration.
articles.title: Fernando Mendoza: How top NFL draft pick's mother inspired his rise

articles.description: BBC sports editor Dan Roan examines how Gary Lineker and Gary Neville became two of the biggest players in a rapidly changing media industry.
articles.title: How Gary Neville and Gary Lineker became rival podcast moguls

articles.description: China prepares for the last-16 match between Ding Junhui and Zhao Xintong – the country's first ranking event winner and trailblazer against its first - and the defending - world champion.
articles.title: 2026 World Snooker Championship: Zhao Xintong v Ding Junhui could break TV viewing records

articles.description: Head coach Eddie Howe says he is looking forward to sitting down with Newcastle United's owners next week to "express things from my perspective".
articles.title: Newcastle: Eddie Howe 'looking forward' to talks with owners

articles.description: Lamine Yamal will miss the rest of Barcelona's season with a hamstring injury but he is expected to return for Spain at the World Cup.
articles.title: Lamine Yamal to miss rest of Barcelona season but expected to be fit for World Cup
